title: Hypothesis
description: A candidate solution path with supporting evidence and scoring

summary.description: One-paragraph description of the proposed solution path

required_conditions.description: List of game state conditions required for this path

supporting_claims.description: Claim IDs that support this hypothesis

contradicting_claims.description: Claim IDs that contradict this hypothesis

unknowns.description: Open questions or conditions with unknown values

risk.description: Risk of wasting time if wrong (1=low, 5=high)

likelihood.description: Estimated probability this is the correct path

expected_info_gain.description: Expected reduction in search space if this test passes

evidence_fit.description: How well this fits existing evidence (0-1)

constraint_fit.description: How well this respects hard constraints (0-1)

priority_score.description: Computed priority = likelihood * info_gain * constraint_fit / test_cost

test_protocol_id.description: ID of the test protocol for this hypothesis

last_tested_at.description: ISO timestamp of last test execution

notes.description: Analyst notes on reasoning or caveats

applied_run_ids.description: Run IDs already applied to this hypothesis. Prevents belief updates from being applied multiple times
